Heard Record perused It is an admined fact that the post ofvillage headman of Maghian fehsil Pindigheb, Disirict Atiock fell VacanI uue I death uf Ahmed Khan heudiin. ٩ ٨٨٢٨ permission given by the District Officer ( Revenue) Collector to initiate the proceedings Ior up of vacancy Initially, the petitioner Was appointed hcadman by way order dated 189 May, 2OI7 passed by Ihe District Collector Attock. Fecling aggrieved Shabbir Ahmed preferred un appeal before the Commissioncr Ihe appeal Was aceepted by way of order dated 23u January, 2018 anO the mianer ٠ ٨ ٢٣ the Distric Collecior for Iresh uppoInt In pursuance Ihe snid OIDCI, fresh applications ٥٢ ٦، invited by Tehsildar Irom the willing candidates Five persons in toto, including the petitioner and the Trespondent, applied for the said pUsI Ultimately due withdrawal of the candidature of two applicans, the Fetitioner, ' respundent and one Shabbir Ahmed remained in field Record reveals that Tehsildar recommended the ' respondent sultable candidate for the post who then ٢٦٧٥ ٢٨؛١٢٨ the tase Io Ihe Arsistant Commissioner Pindigheb which further forwarded tO Ihe District Collector, Anoek for decزs10n The District Collector Anoek, vide his order dated 23 October, ZUIB, appointed the Tesuondeni village headman The petitioner assailed the said order through an appeal before Ihe Additional Comuissiuner Consolication ), Rawalpindi Division Camp Atock ) His appeal was dismissed by way of order dated I4" (2007 u٨dcI village villag ( villane flling village
